description: Brown handbagA flap over the mouth with pleated detailing and a magnetic button closureOne main compartmentOne slip pocket in front with pleated detailing and metal brandingSynthetic lining with a zipped pocket and mobile slot, stitched on brand tag insidePanelled back with stitch detailing down the centreGolden coloured antique finished rivetsOne short handle that is attached with metal ringsA long adjustable and detachable strapWarranty: 6 months against manufacturing defects
